beats.narration_text: Halo. A learner asks: build me an interactive simulation of lasso vs ridge: why a diamond beats a circle for sparsity. One Claude prompt. Here is what comes back.

beats.narration_text: LASSO vs Ridge: Why a Diamond Beats a Circle for Sparsity is one of those ideas that is easier to see than to state. the core behaviour of lasso vs ridge: why a diamond beats a circle for sparsity. This simulation makes that visible — and every educator can build one.

beats.narration_text: the prediction holds — lasso vs ridge: why a diamond beats a circle for sparsity behaves as the equations say. Exactly as the equations predict.

One prompt. A live demonstration of lasso vs ridge: why a diamond beats a circle for sparsity. For educators: every concept in your course can have one of these. Claude builds it; you judge it; your students explore it.
Open this file in your browser and drag the controls. Or ask Claude to add a second parameter, change the palette, or explain the physics step by step alongside the simulation.
Take this prompt, run it on your own topic. Your turn.
